category_sources: Official spinroot.com page describes Spin as an open-source software verification tool.
source_facts.description says Spin is an efficient verification tool for multi-threaded software.
display_name_sources: Official spinroot.com manual uses the Spin name.
source_facts.name is spin and source_facts.homepage is the official Spin site.
docs_sources: Official spinroot.com Basic Spin Manual is the dedicated manual page.
Official spinroot.com provides Manual.pdf as the downloadable manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/nimble-code/Spin; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official spinroot.com manual describes Spin analysis of concurrent systems and Promela models.
source_facts.description identifies verification of multi-threaded software.
